reviews.review_text: sadly the official admins perm muted me for speaking out against pedophilia .... this game is a HAVEN for pedos and so is the official discord i would stay far far away from this game and its gross community that allows such behavior

Used to love this game, and even moderated for it on this account, but I would not recommend this game purely due to developers' negligence (whether intentional or not) of handling issues being reported and not listening to valid feedback in their official spaces that I've experienced from both sides of the community. 

I've uninstalled this game permanently and recommend others to form their own opinion on the game and how the developers treat the community or handle even basic things like updates before doing the same. Hopeful things may change, but they won't because there is no accountability or try to change with the same people time and time again, and this seems to be a pattern. 

Wish the best for the game regardless because the love invested by those who do care. Noticed I had yet to put a review, and I wanted to put into brief words based on my experience overall why I will not touch this game again despite the nostalgia it once held because Steam required something more than a brief departure.

Having played this game for 100 hours, the isle for about 900 and path of titans for about 800+ I can say that I don’t plan on stopping BoB anytime soon. I came in unaware of any past or ongoing drama and can say that the graphics are great and mechanics are a breath of fresh air. No collecting acorns to grow and no ridiculous pin mechanic. You grow until you die which keeps me interested in playing. The skill tree mixed with dynamic play styles is incredible, the community is helpful and has as much conflict as any other game with a chatbox. 

Don’t let the negative reviews keep you from playing this it’s a masterpiece and deserves more players. The official servers can go down at times but they come back online quickly and u can get back into the action

long time PoT/Isle player here. BoB is great. Ignore the negative reviews and just play the game! it speaks for itself. If youve played either Pot or TheIsle or both you will see exactly what I mean. After only a few hours Im fairly certain BoB is gonna have the most hours played out of the 3! Now i gtg do some mad grinding on BoB. Wish me Luck!

So to preface this, 4800+ hours on this game, so at ONE point, it was actually fun.

But like all things, that fun gets sucked out of the game especially when the self-entitlement of Unofficial Server Staff gets called into question, for several servers I've watched staff on Unofficials go from Fun-Loving, Upbeat and generally quite fun to be around, to a sudden switch to Overly sensitive, barking orders, demanding respect (Respect is earned, not given, regardless of what "rules" are in place.)

I've spoken at length with probably more than 20 people about this particular topic and I've identified that it's not just me that's experienced this issue, the "Admin" position on any unofficial server is VOLUNTARY, not mandatory, if you're pushing your own agenda in that role, then I'm sorry but you are unfit to fill that role, it's that simple.

As for the ACTUAL gameplay experience, for a lot of dinos, it's gone from great, to bad, to good, to horrible, to tolerable at best, the optimization for a game like this is astoundingly poor even on a relatively powerful rig and while the updates that have been rolling out look decent on paper, I can't help but wonder how long you beat a dead horse before you move on to your next project? (Or rewrite the entire game the right way)

The base idea of this game is fantastic, but poorly thought out and even more poorly executed, sadly the unofficial servers are a hive of groomers and snowflakes who'll take offense to almost anything and immediately cry "BAN THEM FOREVER" the moment someone disagrees with them, it's a pretty juvenile environment to be totally fair.

As for the state of Unofficials in general, they're pretty much all dead apart from ONE server, which I was banned on for "Disrespecting Staff" when I had a bone to pick with how Griefers were handled and how players are barely allowed to defend themselves or their friends, was the ban justified? I'm sure in their eyes it was, but I've since moved past that and on to bigger better things and have finally had time to really sit and think about how my experience with this game really was and I find myself asking why I stayed with it for as long as I did... 

I guess at one point I had a level of faith in the developers to actually iron out things overall, which for a big part, they did do a lot and that deserves praise in and of itself, but the game in it's current state even now, I still couldn't recommend to anyone who actually wants a game to truly enjoy, outside of playing Skin Roulette and Egg Jail Simulator.

Maybe things will improve in the long term, but I honestly don't think they will and while I may keep tabs on future updates to see what actually changes, I personally don't feel like I'll make a return to it anytime in the near future.


[b]TLDR:[/b]
Community is caged and defensive, incapable of accepting hard truths.
Graphics CAN look great but only for Screenshot Purposes, not long term play.
Unofficial Servers are swarming with self-entitlement and abuse of power positions.
There's just better games out there these days that perform so much better and typically achieve the goal they set out to achieve.


Overall? [b]1/10[/b]

TBH, really enjoy playing this game, as long as you don't interact with absolutely anyone, on the chance that you piss the wrong person off, which takes away the whole gameplay element of this game

Pros
- Fun skin system and inherit system
- Be a dinosaur in some very big maps

Cons
- Anticheat seems to be nonexistant. If you piss someone off, you will get insta-killed and your game will crash.
- Additionally with anticheat, people will cheat in custom sizes for their dinos. You will get one shot by a 6.0 Pachy doing 60 MPH in your general direction.
- Your T Rex will be hunted by herbivores with no warning
- Updates tend to cause issues on official servers, especially for lag. I get constant performance issues on the setup attached to this review.

I guess this game has nothing but skin animators havent seen a actual game fixs or optimizations....they are more focused on making skins and charging you than taking the money they make from us to make the game better...the fps  suck because of paper plants causing it to pop in and out all the time and desinc due to random high ping rates more than likly caused by the graghics not rendering properly...ive seen alot of changes to skins and nothing to the actual game its self i would recommend buying this game 5 mabe 6 years i can see it being abandoned after they get their money from it.

Great weather system, great talent trees. Sadly the gameplay is absolute trash and rubbish, there is no redeeming it at all, their own rules prevent players from effectively defending themselves against active rulebreakers and nothing you do results in a punishment of said rulebreakers, best they can do is revive your dino where it will just get killed again anyway by the same problematic group. Video recording as proof and chat logs n screenshots do not help you so why bother playing it at all. They need to completely revamp their dino combat or else this game will die off entirely.
Its an interesting take on a dinosaur game its quite different from path of titans and the isle but a good different its unique and kinda feels like an rpg? keep up the good work devs :D

User experience can vary vastly depending on their approach to the game. For me, the official servers where never really all to much fun, but when I found a specific community server (wicked lands), well I evidently got somewhat hooked.

Gameplay itself is a little bit hard to talk about cause it wasn't really the main focus for me. It isn't one of those PVP games where you can infinitely scale your skill and will constantly be at the edge of your seat. It's more of a walking sim occasionally interrupted by A two minute fight, but I personally found that tot actually be more enjoyable. Especially on private/custom servers, it gives you a chance to essentially just grow a huge dino while chatting with likeminded dino fans.

8/10 When playing be prepared to take clips if you Disconnect and lose hours of growth they will require a clip of the disconnect to assure it wasnt a rage quit. They are currently dealing with memory leak issues which after a multiple hour gaming session causes crashes. Other than that the game really provides what other dinosaur survival pvp games lack. The over capped growth, the inherit system, the talents and traits make this game a unique experience. If youve played The Isle, and/or Path of Titans and enjoyed it you will like this game. (Also pay attention to where it says requires manual uninstall of the EoS anti-cheat after an uninstall, that will save you lots of head ache)
